mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_document ( id, knowledge_base_id, title, original_file_name, file_type, file_size, page_count, status, chunk_count, storage_url, storage_object, uploader_id, uploaded_at, processed_at, failure_reason, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{knowledgeBaseId}, #{title}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{pageCount}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{chunkCount}, #{storageUrl}, #{storageObject}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploadedAt}, #{processedAt}, #{failureReason}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_document SET title = #{title}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, page_count = #{pageCount}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, storage_url = #{storageUrl}, storage_object = #{storageObject}, processed_at = #{processedAt}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_document SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_document SET chunk_count = COALESCE(chunk_count, 0) + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_document SET chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_document SET page_count = #{pageCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = FALSE)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = FALSE) AND status = 'COMPLETED'
